fix: camera feed not displaying due to React timing issue
prs.body:
- Move srcObject assignment from startCamera() into a useEffect that fires after isCameraActive becomes true, ensuring the <video> element is mounted in the DOM before attaching the stream
- Add explicit .play() call for cross-browser compatibility
- Add muted attribute to <video> to satisfy autoPlay requirements

prs.title: feat(langs-precompiled): auto-document unsupported languages in README

labels.name: seems-ai-generated
labels.description: We label this as a rejection to PR that seems to be AI generated. Please do not do that.

prs.body:
This PR adds automatic tracking and documentation of languages that fail to precompile in the `@shikijs/langs-precompiled` package.

## Changes

### Build Script (`scripts/langs.ts`)
- Added `unsupportedLangs` array to track languages that fail during precompilation
- Added `updateReadme()` function to automatically update the README with the list of unsupported languages
- Calls `updateReadme()` at the end of the build process

### README
- Replaced the `<!-- TODOs -->` comment with actual documentation
- Currently shows '_None currently_' since all languages are successfully precompiled
- Will automatically update if any languages fail in the future

## Benefits
- Users can now see which languages are not supported in the precompiled package
- Documentation stays in sync with the actual build status
- No manual maintenance required

## Testing
- Ran `pnpm run prepare` successfully
- Verified README was updated correctly
- Confirmed it shows '_None currently_' when all languages are supported

prs.title: fix(twoslash): remove typo 'twoslash-query-presisted' from CSS class

labels.name: seems-ai-generated
labels.description: We label this as a rejection to PR that seems to be AI generated. Please do not do that.

prs.body:
This PR removes the typo 'twoslash-query-presisted' (should be 'persisted') from the CSS class name in renderer-rich.ts. This typo was kept for backward compatibility since v3.17 but is no longer needed as indicated by the TODO comment.

## Changes
- Removed TODO comment and typo from `packages/twoslash/src/renderer-rich.ts`
- Updated test snapshots to reflect the corrected class name

## Testing
- Updated 7 test snapshot files to match the new class name
- All existing tests pass (except one pre-existing failure unrelated to this change)

Fixes the issue mentioned in the TODO comment at line 413-414 of renderer-rich.ts.

prs.title: Fix: Remove continuous re-rendering caused by 5-second polling interval
prs.body:
- Removed setInterval that was fetching group data every 5 seconds
- Component now only fetches data on mount and when group ID changes
- Resolves issue #42: Continuous re-rendering in GroupDetail component

prs.title: fix: Resolve continuous re-rendering in GroupDetail
prs.body:
- Wrap fetchGroup call in useCallback to prevent infinite re-renders
- Update useEffect dependency array to include loadGroupData
- Add useCallback import to React imports

Closes #42

feat: Theme Switcher & UI Improvements (Fixes #24, #26)
Feature Request: Fix Theme Switcher (Dark/Light) & Relocate UI Positi…
Fix theme functionality: Add dark mode support with immediate updates
prs.body:
## 🐛 Bug Fix

Fixes the non-functional theme setting in the Settings page. Theme now updates immediately when buttons are clicked.

## 🛠 Changes

- Added `darkMode: 'class'` to `tailwind.config.js` for manual theme toggling
- Added theme state and `setTheme` function to global store (`useStore.js`)
- Implemented theme applicator in `App.jsx` that adds/removes `dark` class from document element
- Updated `Settings.jsx` to sync with global theme state
- Theme updates immediately on button click (before API call completes)
- Fixed event listener cleanup to prevent memory leaks
- Added initial theme application on app mount

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria Met

- ✅ Selecting "Dark" immediately switches UI to dark mode
- ✅ Selecting "Light" immediately switches UI to light mode  
- ✅ Selecting "Auto" respects operating system's color scheme
- ✅ Selected theme persists after page reload

## 🔄 Updated for Latest Codebase

This PR includes the theme functionality fixes applied to the latest codebase after pulling recent changes from main branch.

## 🐛 Bug Fix

Fixes the non-functional theme setting in the Settings page.

- ✅ Selecting "Light" immediately switches UI to light mode

- ✅ Selected theme persists after page reload

## 🧪 Testing

Tested theme switching between Light, Dark, and Auto modes. Theme persists across page reloads.

prs.title: Use system locale for defaultLanguage (#24851)
prs.body:
## Summary
detect the system’s locale (first from LC_ALL/LANG, otherwise via platform APIs) and pass it to JavaScriptCore’s defaultLanguage hook so Date.toLocaleString() and other Intl APIs respect whatever the OS is configured to use
hook the same logic into NodeVMGlobalObject so sandboxed Node contexts inherit that locale too
add a regression test (test/regression/issue/24851.test.ts) that spawns Bun with LANG=en_IN.UTF-8 and confirms the default formatter becomes en-IN
Fixes #24851.
##Testing
bun bd test test/regression/issue/24851.test.ts (fails locally right now because macOS reports EPERM opening src/node-fallbacks/vendor; rerun once that directory is accessible)

prs.title: ai slop
prs.body:
This PR has been marked as AI slop and the description has been updated to avoid confusion or misleading reviewers.

Many AI PRs are fine, but sometimes they submit a PR too early, fail to test if the problem is real, fail to reproduce the problem, or fail to test that the problem is fixed. If you think this PR is not AI slop, please leave a comment.

prs.title: Fix repeated "Try again" message loop in chat setup (#277766)

labels.name: info-needed
labels.description: Issue requires more information from poster

milestone.title: Backlog
milestone.description: Work not yet planned for a specific release.

prs.body:
Fixes ~~#277766~~ #277768

Add retry limits to prevent infinite retry loops when chat setup, sign-in, or installation fails repeatedly. Each retry mechanism now tracks attempts and stops showing the "Try again" dialog after 3 failed attempts.

## Changes
- Add retryCount parameter to `signIn()` method with MAX_RETRIES = 3
- Add retryCount parameter to `doInstallWithRetry()` method with MAX_RETRIES = 3  
- Add retryCount tracking to `ChatSetupTriggerAction.run()` with MAX_RETRIES = 3

## Testing
- Verified that retry dialogs stop appearing after 3 failed attempts
- Confirmed that users can still manually retry by running the command again (which resets the counter)
- No linter errors introduced

This prevents users from getting stuck in an endless loop of "Try again" dialogs when the underlying issue persists.

prs.title: feat: Add native Express.js shim for Bun.serve
prs.body:
# Native Express.js shim for Bun.serve

Fixes #24759

## Summary

This PR implements a native Express.js shim that works directly with `Bun.serve`, avoiding the Node.js compatibility layer for better performance. This allows existing Express applications to run natively on Bun without requiring rewrites.

## Changes

- **Added** `src/js/thirdparty/express-bun.ts` - Core Express shim implementation
  - Express Application class with routing support
  - Express Request/Response wrappers compatible with Bun's Request/Response
  - Router with middleware support
  - HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, ALL
  - Route parameters (`/users/:id`)
  - Basic body parsing (JSON, text, form-urlencoded)
  - Middleware chain execution
  - Settings support (case sensitive routing, strict routing)

- **Added** `test/js/third_party/express/express-bun-serve.test.ts` - Test suite
  - Basic GET route tests
  - Route with parameters
  - POST with JSON body
  - 404 handling

- **Added** `docs/guides/ecosystem/express-bun-serve.mdx` - Documentation

## Usage

import express from "express";
const app = express();

app.get("/users/:id", (req, res) => {
  res.json({ userId: req.params.id });
});

Bun.serve({
  fetch: app.fetch.bind(app),
  port: 3000,
});## Status

This is an initial implementation with core Express features. Advanced features like view rendering, advanced middleware, and error handling middleware are marked as TODO for future work.

## Testing

Tests pass with `bun bd test test/js/third_party/express/express-bun-serve.test.ts`
